name: mindustries-os-hub
description: Agentic Operating Systems for solopreneurs — orchestrator + specialist agent teams for marketing, legal, product, security, finance, sales, and support.

plugins.name: legal-os
plugins.description: General Counsel orchestrator with specialists for compliance, GDPR/data protection, contracts, regulatory intelligence, incident response, vendor risk, and legal research.

plugins.name: marketing-os
plugins.description: CMO orchestrator with specialists for SEO, content, email, social media, competitive intelligence, analytics, and brand monitoring.

plugins.name: po-os
plugins.description: Lead PO orchestrator with specialists for regulatory-driven features, jurisdictional localization, and voice-of-customer discovery.

plugins.name: security-os
plugins.description: vCISO orchestrator with specialists for application security review, threat modeling, infrastructure hardening, vendor security, and security incident response.

plugins.name: finance-os
plugins.description: CFO orchestrator with specialists for bookkeeping, invoicing and collections, cash-flow forecasting, tax deadline planning, and pricing analysis.

plugins.name: sales-os
plugins.description: Sales Director orchestrator with specialists for pipeline management, 1-to-1 outreach, proposal drafting, and CRM hygiene.

plugins.name: support-os
plugins.description: Support Lead orchestrator with specialists for ticket triage, response drafting, knowledge-base authoring, and support insights that feed product discovery.
